title: No Title
summary: The Medina Foundation is a private family foundation that has worked to improve lives by funding human service organizations that provide direct support to Puget Sound residents.
llm_deadline: This competitive process will likely be the final funding opportunity from Medina as we aim to sunset the Foundation in 2027
llm_eligibility: In honoring the vision of our founder, Norton Clapp, the Medina Foundation has aspired to improve lives by granting primarily general operating funding to human service organizations that provide direct support to Puget Sound residents.
